text:
EXPLANATION: The paper "Boltzmann generators: Sampling equilibrium states of many-body systems with deep learning" is a real publication in Science (2019). The cited author list includes Simon Olsson, whereas the original publication lists F. Noé, Jonas Köhler, and Hao Wu; this appears to be a minor author list error (likely due to misattribution or database variation) rather than a fabrication.

LINK: https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aaw1147
FOUND_TITLE: Boltzmann generators: Sampling equilibrium states of many-body systems with deep learning
FOUND_AUTHORS: Frank Noé, Simon Olsson, Jonas Köhler, Hao Wu
FOUND_YEAR: 2019
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
